Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "ion-threshold-tuning",
    "control": "default",
    "histograms": [
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms"
    ],
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ],
        "load_time": [
            0,
            30000
        ],
        "response_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ],
        "js_exec_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ]
    },
    "segments": [
        "All",
        "Windows",
        "Linux",
        "Mac"
    ],
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2023-08-01",
    "endDate": "2023-08-09",
    "channel": "release",
    "branches": [
        "default",
        "2000",
        "750",
        "1000"
    ]
}
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "release"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "release"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "release"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  response_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  response_time >= 0 AND response_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "release"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  js_exec_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  js_exec_time >= 0 AND js_exec_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-08-01')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-08-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "ion-threshold-tuning").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
